title: Flutter
body:
Hey!

**Flutter is a simple mod that allows players to make their skins blink just through resource packs!**

## Here is how to do it:

Assuming you already have a default texture pack already, you're going to need to make a new directory, next to the '**minecraft**' folder, called '**flutter**'.
Then, inside that flutter folder, add a '**textures**', and inside '**textures**' add a '**skin**' folder.
Inside the skin folder, add another folder and name it your minecraft username. This needs to be in **lowercase**!
    For example, '**n1tr0n__**' would stay as '**n1tr0n__**', but for one like '**TheTrueYak**', it would be '**thetrueyak**'.

Inside this folder named after your username, you can drag and drop the two skin files. The one with the open eyes needs to be called '**skin**', and the one with the closed eyes
has to be called '**blink**'. They both have to be a png.

And you're done! Load in with the resource pack and boom! You have blinking! You can do this with any of your friends minecraft skins too, and even a whole server in order to immerse yourself in the gameplay more :3
